jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Croma
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Croma in Jodhpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Croma:
Croma is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Croma!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
